recommendations.title: Perfect Strangers
recommendations.overview: During a dinner, a group of friends decide to share whatever message or phone call they will receive during the evening, with unforeseen consequences.

recommendations.title: Four's a Crowd
recommendations.overview: Julián, a divorced man with financial problems, uses a cell phone application to share his car with strangers.

recommendations.title: Perfectos desconocidos
recommendations.overview: A group of longtime friends get together for dinner. When they decide to share the content of every text message, email, and phone call they receive, secrets are unveiled and the balance is upset.

recommendations.title: The Ferpect Crime
recommendations.overview: A playboy has the tables turned on him when he finds himself being used as a plaything by an undesirable woman.

recommendations.title: Witching & Bitching
recommendations.overview: A gang of gold thieves land in a coven of witches who are preparing for an ancient ritual... and in need of a sacrifice.

recommendations.title: The Last Circus
recommendations.overview: A trapeze artist must decide between her lust for Sergio, the Happy Clown, or her affection for Javier, the Sad Clown, both of whom are deeply disturbed.

recommendations.title: The Bar
recommendations.overview: In downtown Madrid, a series of mysterious gunshots trap a motley assortment of people in a decrepit bar.

recommendations.title: Veneciafrenia
recommendations.overview: When a group of young Spanish tourists travel to Venice for a bachelorette party, they are met by angry locals who are not keen on foreigners and soon they find themselves fighting for their lives.

recommendations.title: Common Wealth
recommendations.overview: After finding an enormous amount of money hidden in a dead man's apartment, real estate agent Julia must face the wrath of the very peculiar inhabitants of the apartment building, who will stop at nothing to get their hands on the money.

recommendations.title: The Day of the Beast
recommendations.overview: When a rogue priest discovers the exact date the Antichrist will be born, he enlists a Death Metal record store clerk and a cheesy TV psychic for an urban spree of gore, sacrilege and twisted humor to prevent the Apocalypse.
